title: Niche playbook: process
description: Process / How-We-Work section step count and per-step labels. The build agent renders the Process section using these. Per-client brand-dna may override with the client's own process; this is the niche default.

stepCount.description: Total step count. 3-4 for low-friction transactions; 5-6 for considered purchases; 6-8 for high-trust premium services.

iconHint.description: Optional hint for which icon the build agent renders (consult niche-playbook/design-vocabulary.md for icon set).

sectionHeading.description: Optional section heading override. Default pattern: "Our [Service] Process".
